_about: Repos to mount under team/. team/ is a mount point, not a new home: each person's Claude clones the entries whose group they belong to (see local/groups). Nothing here is moved or renamed, repos keep their real names and their existing hosts. Fill repos[] in when you are ready to slice things up; until then onboarding just sets up the OS.

_schema.name: folder name created under team/ (use the repo's real name)
_schema.remote: git URL to clone (keeps its real name and host)
_schema.group: access tag; only machines whose local/groups lists this group will clone it. Omit for everyone.
